title: before / after / until / since + S + V

formulas.zh: 在...之前/之後/直到/自從...時間點，主句動作發生
主句動作先發生，後接時間連接詞引導的時間子句

explanation: 時間連接詞引導時間副詞子句，說明主句動作發生的時間點。Before/After/Until 可用於任何時態；Since 特殊，從句接過去簡單式，主句接現在完成式或現在完成進行式。時間子句可置於句首或句尾。注意 Since 表示「自從...以來」，強調持續性，而 Before/After 表示單一時間點。

examples.eng: Before I graduated from high school, I had never thought about studying abroad.
examples.chi: 在我高中畢業之前，我從未想過出國留學。

examples.eng: Since she moved to Taipei, she has made many new friends.
examples.chi: 自從她搬到台北，她交了很多新朋友。

examples.eng: After the exam finished, the students felt relieved and celebrated together.
examples.chi: 考試結束後，學生們感到放鬆並一起慶祝。

examples.eng: Until you practice regularly, you will never improve your English pronunciation.
examples.chi: 除非你定期練習，否則你永遠無法改善英文發音。

extension.tip: Since 子句必須用過去簡單式，主句必須用現在完成式。Before 和 After 的時態需配合邏輯：Before 後通常接過去完成式；After 後接過去簡單式。Until 可表否定義（not...until），意為「直到才」。

examples.test: Since she left, I have felt lonely. ✓ vs. Since she left, I felt lonely. ✗
examples.result: → Since 子句用過去簡單式，主句必須用現在完成式表示持續至今的狀態

examples.test: Until he apologized, she didn't forgive him. ✓ vs. Until he apologized, she forgave him. ✗
examples.result: → Until 配合否定形，表示「直到才」，強調時間的等待性

examples.test: After I finished my homework, I watched TV. ✓ vs. After I finish my homework, I watched TV. ✗
examples.result: → After 子句與主句時態保持一致的過去簡單式

extension.note: Since 用完成式，Before 用過去完成式，After 用過去簡單式，Until 配合否定義。

parts: she moved to London, she has been very happy.
exercises.sentence: Since she moved to London, she has been very happy.
exercises.translation: 自從她搬到倫敦，她一直很快樂。

parts: the meeting started, the director has been discussing the project details.
exercises.sentence: Since the meeting started, the director has been discussing the project details.
exercises.translation: 自從會議開始，主任一直在討論專案細節。

parts: graduation, many of my classmates have pursued their dreams in different fields.
exercises.sentence: Since graduation, many of my classmates have pursued their dreams in different fields.
exercises.translation: 自從畢業以來，我的許多同學在不同領域追求他們的夢想。

parts: you finish reading this book, you will understand the author's intention better.
exercises.sentence: After you finish reading this book, you will understand the author's intention better.
exercises.translation: 在你讀完這本書之後，你會更好地理解作者的意圖。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的時間連接詞完成句子，說明事件發生順序。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ I arrived at the station, the train had already left.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (After)。句子表示「在我到達車站之後，火車已經離開」，時間順序是：火車先離開，然後我才到達。After 引導的時間子句表示先發生的事件。選項 A (Before) 邏輯相反；C (Since) 用於持續性狀態不符；D (Until) 表示「直到...為止」邏輯不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句子時態判斷正確的時間連接詞，強調持續狀態。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ she graduated from university, she has been working as an engineer for five years.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (Since)。主句使用現在完成式 (has been working) 表示持續狀態，搭配 Since 引導的過去簡單式 (graduated)，表示「自從她大學畢業以來」的持續性。Before/After 用於單一時間點；Until 表示時間的終點，時態搭配不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入適當連接詞，主句使用完成式表達已完成的動作。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ we had finished our project, we celebrated with our team members at a nearby restaurant.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (After)。主句使用過去簡單式 (celebrated)，表示在完成項目之後進行慶祝活動。After 引導時間子句說明先完成的事件 (had finished)。Since 需搭配現在完成式；Until 表終點不符；Before 邏輯相反。句子結構為：After + 過去完成式，+ 過去簡單式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨析 until 與 before 的區別，判斷合適的連接詞。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The company will continue to operate this factory _______ the new environmental regulations are implemented, which is expected to take another two years.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (until)。句意為「在新環保法規實施之前，公司會繼續運營這座工廠」。Until 表示持續狀態直到某時間點終止，符合「繼續運營直到新法規實施」的邏輯。Before 表示時間點，不強調持續；Since 強調自某點開始的持續狀態；After 表先後順序。Future continuous 搭配 until 表示某狀態在未來持續到某時間點停止。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 在我完成功課之前，我不能去朋友家玩。
translation_exercises.answer: Before I finish my homework, I cannot go to my friend's house. / I cannot go to my friend's house before I finish my homework.
key_points: Before + S + V 時間子句
hints: 提示1：Before 子句可置於句首（加逗號）或句尾（不加逗號）
提示2：注意 finish 用第一人稱單數形式，主句 cannot 後接原形動詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 自從她搬到台北以來，她一直在補習班教英文。
translation_exercises.answer: Since she moved to Taipei, she has been teaching English at a cram school. / She has been teaching English at a cram school since she moved to Taipei.
key_points: 現在完成進行式 has been teaching
hints: 提示1：Since 從句必須用過去簡單式，主句用現在完成式或現在完成進行式，強調動作自過去持續至今
提示2：常見錯誤是主句用現在簡單式 'teaches' 或從句用現在完成式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 直到他收到大學錄取通知後，他的父母才放心了。
translation_exercises.answer: After he received the university admission letter, his parents finally felt relieved. / His parents finally felt relieved after he received the university admission letter.
key_points: received 表示過去完成的動作
finally 強調時間點的轉變
hints: 提示1：After 表示一個單一時間點之後，兩個動作都用過去簡單式表示先後順序
提示2：注意 'relieved' 是形容詞或過去分詞，作為感受狀態；不要混淆 'until' 和 'after' 的用法

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 自從疫情開始以來，學生們已經習慣於在家上線課程，直到學校完全恢復實體上課為止。
translation_exercises.answer: Since the pandemic started, students have grown accustomed to taking online classes until schools fully resumed in-person classes. / Since the pandemic began, students have been adjusting to online learning until physical classes returned to normal.
key_points: Since + S + V (過去簡單式) 與現在完成式搭配
Until 表示持續到某個時間點
hints: 提示1：Since 引導的時間副詞子句置於句首，主句用現在完成式；Until 可單獨出現在主句尾，說明狀況持續到何時
提示2：注意 'since' 強調持續性（已經持續的狀態），'until' 標記終點；兩者可在同一句中搭配使用，但分別引導不同的時間概念
